segments.content:
The video begins with an MPAA rating screen, which is entirely green with white text. It reads: "THE FOLLOWING PREVIEW HAS BEEN APPROVED FOR APPROPRIATE AUDIENCES BY THE MOTION PICTURE ASSOCIATION OF AMERICA, INC." Below this text, on the left, is "www.filmratings.com" and on the right, "www.mpaa.org".

At the 0:06 mark, the screen transitions to the Disney castle logo at dusk. The castle is lit up, and there's a river in the foreground. Fireworks or a magical arc appear over the castle. The word "Disney" is written in its iconic script below the castle.

At 0:08, the screen cuts to white with the word "ZOOTOPIA" in black, serif font. A male voice begins narrating.
**Narrator**: "In the world of Zootopia..."

At 0:09, the word "humans" appears below "Zootopia". A black mark underlines "humans", and then it is crossed out by a scribbling animation.
**Narrator**: "...humans never happened."

At 0:13, the words "modern" and then "civilized" appear in black font.
**Narrator**: "Which makes Zootopia a modern, civilized world..."

At 0:17, the word "animal" appears. A cartoon fox peeks out from the right side of the screen, a black arrow points from "animal" to the fox.
**Narrator**: "...that is entirely animal."

The fox winks and smiles.
**Narrator**: "That is an animal."

At 0:20, the screen transitions to black with the text "FROM THE CREATORS OF" in green. Below it, the logos for "FROZEN" and "BIG HERO 6" are displayed. The "FROZEN" logo is icy blue, and the "BIG HERO 6" logo is red and blocky.

At 0:22, the scene returns to the white screen with the word "anthropomorphic" in black font. The fox from before enters from the right, walking on all fours, and then stands up on two feet as the word "anthropomorphic" appears.
**Narrator**: "Animals in Zootopia are anthropomorphic."

The fox, now standing on two feet, looks around and winks.
**Narrator**: "That is just a big fancy word that means they walk around on two feet."

At 0:27, the text "two feet" appears to the left of the fox. The fox briefly shifts its weight.
**Narrator**: "They do not go to work nude."

At 0:29, the word "clothing" appears to the left of the fox. The fox looks surprised and covers its midsection with its hands, looking embarrassed.

The video opens with Nick Wilde, a cartoon fox from Zootopia, standing on a plain white background. Initially, he is nude, and the text "two feet" appears on the left side of the screen.

At 0:01, the text changes to "clothing." Nick looks down, and clothes appear on him: a light green collared shirt with a striped blue tie and brown pants. He adjusts his tail, now clad in clothing, and gives a confident look, then winks. A male voiceover states, "They do not go to work nude. Thank you. Almost. That's got it."

At 0:08, the text changes to "technology." Nick holds up a small, rectangular device that resembles a smartphone. He glances at it, and a "ding" sound is heard. A massive cape buffalo (Chief Bogo), dressed in a police uniform, walks into the frame from the left, almost completely overshadowing Nick. Nick looks up at the large animal with a nervous expression, his tail drooping.

At 0:14, the camera pulls back to reveal a large, diverse crowd of anthropomorphic animals, all clothed, moving across the white background. These animals represent various species, sizes, and colors, including elephants, rhinos, giraffes, zebras, a wildebeest, a polar bear, and many more. An upbeat, jazzy tune begins to play.

The voiceover explains, "Okay, there are mammals from all over the globe in Zootopia. Large and small, fast and slow." The animals continue to walk and interact, some holding items like a potted plant.

At 0:24, the crowd gradually disperses, leaving only Nick, a small rabbit (Judy Hopps) in a police uniform, and a sloth (Flash) on the white background. The voiceover continues, "But the truth is, Zootopia isn't perfect. And just like our world, not everyone gets along." Judy walks up to Nick and stands beside him as the music fades out at 0:31.

The video opens with a white background. An anthropomorphic fox, Nick Wilde, wearing a green collared shirt and striped tie, stands still on the left. An anthropomorphic rabbit, Judy Hopps, dressed in a blue uniform with a red vest and hat, hops towards him from the left.

**Audio:** A narrator begins, "Not everyone gets along."

As the rabbit approaches the fox, the narrator continues, "Especially natural enemies." The rabbit bumps into the fox's leg and falls backward onto the ground with a soft **thump**. Text labels appear: "fox" with an arrow pointing to Nick, and "bunny" with an arrow pointing to Judy. The fox looks down with a smirk.

The rabbit quickly gets up with a quick **thump** sound and runs off-screen to the right. The fox watches it go.

A moment later, the rabbit re-enters the frame from the right, still running, and stops in front of the fox. The narrator says, "Which can create some issues." The rabbit holds up a small black device, possibly a recorder or smartphone, towards the fox. A soft **squeak** sound is heard. The fox looks at the device.

The fox then shrugs, raises its hands, and places them on its hips, looking slightly annoyed.

**Audio:** The narrator continues, "But nature always gives animals special skills to survive, and while one may have amazing night vision..."
The screen fades to black. Two glowing white eyes appear and move slightly in the dark, accompanied by a faint **whoosh** sound.

The screen fades back to white. The rabbit is now standing alone on the right side of the frame, twitching its ears, as if listening intently.
**Audio:** The narrator says, "Another may have incredible hearing." A small **boing** sound accompanies the ear twitch.

The rabbit pulls out a small dart gun, aims it, and fires with a **click** sound.
**Audio:** The narrator adds, "And an air-powered elephant tranquilizer."

The scene cuts to the fox. A dart with a small green leaf on its end hits the fox in its rear. A loud **POP** sound is heard, followed by a **thud** as the fox collapses to the ground, seemingly tranquilized. The rabbit stands over the fallen fox, hands on hips, looking pleased with itself.

The screen fades to black. Teal text appears: "so now you know."
**Audio:** The narrator states, "Zootopia."

The Disney Zootopia logo appears in gradient green and purple. Below it, teal text "Like" appears.
**Audio:** The narrator continues, "Like nothing..." The accompanying whimsical background music fades out.

This video segment features a mix of a title card, a short animated scene, and an end card, combining both visual and audio elements.

**0:00 - 0:04: Title Card and Voiceover**
*   **Visual:** The screen is completely black. In the center, the word "Disney" appears in its classic script font, rendered in a bright lime green. Below it, in much larger, stylized block letters, is "ZOOTOPIA." This title has a gradient effect, starting with vibrant green on the left and transitioning to a turquoise blue-green on the right. Below the main title, the text "Like nothing you've seen be-fur." fades in, also in the green-to-blue gradient.
*   **Audio:** A deep, friendly male voiceover says, "Zootopia." After a brief pause, he adds, with a playful tone, "Like nothing you've seen be-fur." The "be-fur" is clearly a pun on "before."

**0:04 - 0:09: Animated Scene**
*   **Visual:** The scene cuts to a plain white background. Three animated characters are visible.
    *   On the left, Judy Hopps (a rabbit) stands upright, wearing a blue police uniform, cap, and glasses. She holds a small, clear spray bottle.
    *   In the center foreground, Nick Wilde (a fox) lies on his stomach with his head turned slightly to his right, eyes half-closed, appearing groggy or annoyed. He wears a yellow shirt with green trim.
    *   To the right of Nick, a tall, slender, grey-furred animal (resembling a wildebeest or a similar bovine creature) stands, wearing a green and white striped shirt. It has small horns on its head.
    *   Judy sprays a stream of bright green liquid from her bottle towards the tall animal's head. The liquid splatters on its face and horns. The tall animal reacts, slowly making an "ugh" face, then wobbles backward and falls completely out of view to the right, leaving only Judy and Nick on screen.
*   **Audio:** A quick "psst" sound indicates the spray. A wet "splat" sound follows as the liquid hits. The tall animal emits a low, guttural gurgle, then a soft "Ohh." As it falls, there's a more drawn-out, almost comical "Ohhh-hoh" sound, followed by a distinct "thud" as it hits the unseen ground. Light, whimsical background music accompanies this scene.

**0:09 - 0:12: End Card**
*   **Visual:** The screen returns to solid black. In the center, the text "COMING 2016" appears, using the same green-to-blue gradient font as the "ZOOTOPIA" title, but slightly more condensed. Below this, "disney.com/zootopia" is displayed. Further down, the logos for "3D" and "REAL D 3D" are shown. At the very bottom, in smaller text, is "©2015 Disney Enterprises, Inc." All text maintains the same green-to-blue gradient.
*   **Audio:** The whimsical background music from the previous scene continues briefly, then fades out entirely. There is no further voiceover.
